disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Navy sends doctors to treat rat virus patient on remote island - The Telegraph
updates.body_en: Navy sends doctors to treat rat virus patient on remote island The Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 英国海军派医生前往偏远岛屿治疗汉坦病毒患者。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus confirmed in crew member - EU Reporter
updates.body_en: Hantavirus confirmed in crew member EU Reporter
updates.summary_zh: 欧盟记者报道一名船员确诊汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus is gaining ground in the US, startling researchers: ‘Widespread and complex virus’ - New York Post
updates.body_en: Hantavirus is gaining ground in the US, startling researchers: ‘Widespread and complex virus’ New York Post
updates.summary_zh: 美国汉坦病毒蔓延，研究人员称其广泛且复杂。

updates.title_en: Race against a virus How did scientists crack hantavirus cruise mystery? - Ahmedabad Mirror
updates.body_en: Race against a virus How did scientists crack hantavirus cruise mystery? Ahmedabad Mirror
updates.summary_zh: 科学家破解邮轮汉坦病毒谜团。

updates.title_en: A shocking number of Pacific Northwest rodents may carry hantavirus, study finds - KTVZ
updates.body_en: A shocking number of Pacific Northwest rodents may carry hantavirus, study finds KTVZ
updates.summary_zh: 研究发现美国西北太平洋地区大量啮齿动物携带汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases on expedition ship haven't impacted cruise sales or pricing - Travel Weekly
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases on expedition ship haven't impacted cruise sales or pricing Travel Weekly
updates.summary_zh: 探险船汉坦病例未影响邮轮销售和定价。

updates.title_en: Mayday! SA scientists identified hantavirus outbreak in 24 hours - The Times of India
updates.body_en: Mayday! SA scientists identified hantavirus outbreak in 24 hours The Times of India
updates.summary_zh: 南非科学家24小时内识别汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: How South African scientists identified hantavirus on a cruise ship thousands of miles away - AP News
updates.body_en: How South African scientists identified hantavirus on a cruise ship thousands of miles away AP News
updates.summary_zh: 美联社报道南非科学家识别邮轮汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: How scientists cracked a rare hantavirus outbreak linked to a cruise ship far from shore - Telangana Today
updates.body_en: How scientists cracked a rare hantavirus outbreak linked to a cruise ship far from shore Telangana Today
updates.summary_zh: 科学家破解与邮轮相关的罕见汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: Three linked to hantavirus outbreak remain in hospital in Victoria - Times Colonist
updates.body_en: Three linked to hantavirus outbreak remain in hospital in Victoria Times Colonist
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大维多利亚市3名汉坦病毒患者仍在住院。

updates.title_en: Federal Update on Hantavirus and Ebola Outbreaks – May 22, 2026 - CPAC.ca
updates.body_en: Federal Update on Hantavirus and Ebola Outbreaks – May 22, 2026 CPAC.ca
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大公共卫生署发布汉坦病毒和埃博拉疫情联邦更新。

updates.title_en: No Ebola cases in Canada and no new hantavirus cases, chief public health officer says - CBC
updates.body_en: No Ebola cases in Canada and no new hantavirus cases, chief public health officer says CBC
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大首席公共卫生官称无埃博拉病例，无新增汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Canada’s chief public health officer delivers updates on hantavirus, Ebola - Radio-Canada
updates.body_en: Canada’s chief public health officer delivers updates on hantavirus, Ebola Radio-Canada
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大首席公共卫生官更新汉坦病毒和埃博拉疫情。

updates.title_en: WHO says 12th person infected with hantavirus detected in the Netherlands - Al Jazeera
updates.body_en: WHO says 12th person infected with hantavirus detected in the Netherlands Al Jazeera
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称荷兰发现第12例汉坦病毒感染者。

updates.title_en: FULL BRIEFING: Officials share latest on cruise ship hantavirus quarantine in Omaha - WOWT
updates.body_en: FULL BRIEFING: Officials share latest on cruise ship hantavirus quarantine in Omaha WOWT
updates.summary_zh: 官员通报奥马哈邮轮汉坦病毒隔离最新情况。

updates.title_en: Dutch cruise ship crew member tests positive for Hantavirus in isolation - The Telegraph
updates.body_en: Dutch cruise ship crew member tests positive for Hantavirus in isolation The Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 荷兰邮轮一名船员在隔离中检测出汉坦病毒阳性。

updates.title_en: Risk low, but Niagara officials keep watch as hantavirus cases reach Canada - St. Catharines Standard
updates.body_en: Risk low, but Niagara officials keep watch as hantavirus cases reach Canada St. Catharines Standard
updates.summary_zh: 尼亚加拉官员称风险低，但监测汉坦病毒病例进入加拿大。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 after crew member tests positive - NBC News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 after crew member tests positive NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 与邮轮相关的汉坦病毒病例升至12例，一名船员检测阳性。

updates.title_en: WHO chief says hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 - Anadolu Ajansı
updates.body_en: WHO chief says hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 Anadolu Ajansı
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称邮轮关联汉坦病毒病例增至 12 例。
